context.subject: Need Q-CFR pricing by EOD — legal deadline
context.body_snippet: Moving at speed. The legal team needs the price comparison table for the Q-CFR compliance binding before EOD Friday. The client is waiting on our signing.

response_a.body: ACK. I'll put together the Q-CFR pricing breakdown and send by close of business today.

response_b.body: Sure, I'll get you that pricing comparison table for the Q-CFR compliance binding soon. Let me know if you need anything else.

context.subject: Quick hi — coffee next week?
context.body_snippet: Hey! I know it's been ages. When are you free for a coffee break next week? No rush, just wanted to say hi and catch up.

response_a.body: Hey Sarah! Would love to catch up. Coffee sounds great.

response_b.body: Hi! Great to hear from you. I'm free for coffee most Thursdays — just let me know when works for you.

label: tie
rlhf_notes: Personal intent is high-confidence but auto_sent=true is risky. Tells V41 to add personal_inbox_guardian gate.

context.subject: Notice of Claim — patent infringement
context.body_snippet: This letter constitutes formal notice of our client's claim regarding patent US-9,876,543. Please confirm receipt within 72 hours. Do not forward without authorization.

response_a.body: Thanks for the notice. We're reviewing and will respond within the required timeframe.

response_b.body: We have received your notice and our legal team is reviewing. We will respond within 72 hours per your request.

label: prefer_b
rlhf_notes: Gap: reply_all should be forced off for legal intent. V41-A must enforce legal/no_reply_all rule.

context.subject: Enterprise partnership — Q3 roadmap discussion
context.body_snippet: We're evaluating integration partners for our 2026 platform refresh. Would your team be available for a 45-minute sync next week to discuss joint GTM motion?

response_a.body: Sure, sounds great! Happy to chat anytime next week. Let me know what works.

response_b.body: Thank you for reaching out. We'd be happy to schedule a 45-minute discussion to explore integration opportunities. Please share your availability, and our team will prepare a joint GTM overview in advance.

label: prefer_b
rlhf_notes: Gap: formal_partnership intent should enforce formal_response policy. V26 reply_all is correct but tone is wrong.

context.subject: Enterprise billing plan — 500-seat discussion
context.body_snippet: Looking to move to an enterprise tier with 500 users. Happy to connect with your billing and account teams to align on pricing and SLAs.

response_a.body: Got it. I'll get pricing for 500 seats and send you a quote.

response_b.body: Thank you for the inquiry. Our enterprise tier for 500 users includes volume pricing and dedicated SLA. I am routing this to our account team so we can put together a comprehensive proposal.

context.subject: Invoice #INV-2026-0042 — payment confirmation requested
context.body_snippet: Please confirm invoice INV-2026-0042 ($12,850) has been dated and will be paid within our 30-day terms.

response_a.body: Invoice INV-2026-0042 for $12,850 is confirmed dated. Payment will be processed within the 30-day window as agreed.

response_b.body: Hi, we received your invoice. Will process payment soon thanks!

context.subject: Kick-off call for Q-platform migration project
context.body_snippet: Can we schedule a kick-off call next Tuesday at 2pm PT to walk through the Q-platform migration plan? Please confirm availability and share your calendar invite.

response_a.body: Thanks for reaching out. We're interested and look forward to discussing more details.

response_b.body: Tuesday at 2pm PT works for us. Please send the calendar invite and we will confirm the agenda in advance.

label: prefer_b
rlhf_notes: Gap: V26 short-circuits before confirming calendar invite. Pairs show action item miss clearly — use as V41 training pair.

context.subject: Urgent: account locked — HELP
context.body_snippet: My account is locked and I can't log in. It says account suspended but I don't know why. Please unlock asap.

response_a.body: I've reset your account and sent a password reset link. Check your email.

response_b.body: Thank you for reaching out. I'm escalating this to our support team who will reach out to you within 24 hours.

label: prefer_b
rlhf_notes: Gap: intent_confidence 0.55 is below grammar_threshold 0.65 but auto_sent still fired. False positive case — train V41-A ResponseQualityGrader to catch.
